title: Calculators
scope: A set of in-browser calculators: a scientific calculator (default), a compound-interest calculator, and a loan/amortization calculator. The finance calculators solve for whichever value is left blank and show a full payoff schedule. Runs entirely in the browser; no data is stored.

specs.title: Evaluate an expression
specs.behavior: The scientific calculator evaluates a math expression and returns the result.

specs.title: Solve compound interest
specs.behavior: The compound-interest calculator solves for whichever of principal, annual rate, years, or future value is left blank, given the others.

specs.title: Solve a loan / amortization
specs.behavior: The loan/amortization calculator solves for whichever of loan amount, annual rate, term, or payment is left blank and shows a full payoff schedule.
